recommendations.title: Enhance BRSR and TCFD Disclosure by FY26
recommendations.description: JSW Energy should strengthen its BRSR and TCFD disclosures to match or exceed peer standards by the FY26 filing deadline (2026-05-30), reducing the risk of a ₹11.5 Cr cost of capital increase and improving investor confidence. The Sustainability and ESG Reporting team will lead this effort with a budget of ₹1-2 Cr.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid ₹11.5 Cr cost of capital increase by reducing disclosure gap
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power enhanced ESG disclosures leading to ₹5000 Cr green bond issuance and P/E rerating

audit_trail.value: Disclosure gap risks ₹11.5 Cr cost of capital increase
Peer Tata Power's ESG disclosure improvements led to green bond issuance and rerating
TCFD disclosure linked to FII inflows and P/E valuation

recommendations.title: Monitor Regulatory Mandates and Energy Price Shocks
recommendations.description: Establish a monitoring system to track regulatory mandates with compliance deadlines within 24 months and energy price shocks exceeding 25% YoY or 2σ above 5-year rolling mean. Escalate to the Risk Management Committee if thresholds are breached within 6 months to mitigate transition and economic risks.
recommendations.profitability_link: Prevents regulatory penalties and economic losses potentially exceeding ₹10 Cr annually

audit_trail.value: Monitor binding standards with deadlines <= 24 months
Monitor ΔEP >= 25% YoY or EP >= 2σ above 5-yr rolling mean
Regulatory risk monitoring required under BRSR

recommendations.title: Conduct Investor Day on Transition Capex and Abatement
recommendations.description: Organize an investor day by 2026-09-30 to communicate JSW Energy's transition capital expenditure plans and carbon abatement strategies, leveraging momentum from clarified nuclear stance to attract ESG-focused investors and potentially reduce cost of capital by 15-25 bps. Budget allocated: ₹2-3 Cr, led by Investor Relations and Sustainability teams.
recommendations.profitability_link: Potential ₹7-12 Cr annual savings from 15-25 bps cost of capital reduction
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power's investor engagement linked to P/E rerating and green bond issuance

audit_trail.value: Disclosure improvements can lower cost of capital
Peer investor engagement drove valuation rerating
Investor communication on transition capex recommended under TCFD

immediate_low.title: Enhance BRSR and TCFD Disclosure by FY26
Conduct Investor Day on Transition Capex and Abatement

deferred_high.title: Monitor Regulatory Mandates and Energy Price Shocks
